heroHeadline: Day 32 of Iran War: Trump Claims Iran Requested Ceasefire — Tehran Denies; SCOTUS Bars Nationwide Injunctions 6-3; Trump Signs Election Integrity EO; Musk Scales Back DOGE
heroSubtitle: US-Israel strikes continue on Day 32 of the Iran war as Trump claims Tehran requested a ceasefire — a claim Iran's Foreign Ministry flatly denied. The Supreme Court ruled 6-3 in Trump v. CASA that district courts cannot issue nationwide injunctions, a landmark executive-branch victory. Trump signed an election integrity EO directing DHS and SSA to build state voter citizenship lists, drawing immediate legal challenges. Elon Musk announced he will scale DOGE to 1-2 days/week starting in May as Tesla reported a 71% Q1 profit drop. The April 6 deadline for US energy-infrastructure strikes remains in force.
footerNote: Data sourced from White House, Federal Register, executive orders, court records, Al Jazeera, CNN, Reuters, AP, SCOTUSblog, BLS, IEA, Treasury, Goldman Sachs, Federal Reserve, OECD, Cato Institute, CBS News.
